name: Close
description: Close is a CRM focused on sales teams that provides a REST API to access and manage leads, activities, contacts, and related CRM objects.

auth_methods.note: Close API authentication requires an API key and uses HTTP Basic Authentication: use your API key as the username and leave the password blank (e.g., curl -u "YOUR_API_KEY:" ...). Docs also indicate you can authenticate via an Authorization header using a Basic token.

credential_access.note: API keys can be created and managed in the Close app via Settings → API Keys (New API Key). If a user doesn’t see API Keys in Settings, they may lack permission (e.g., admin-only), but credential creation is otherwise self-serve.

api_surface.note: The developer docs state the Close API is a REST API with a base URL and example endpoints (e.g., /api/v1/lead/). Official docs include API reference and SDKs for multiple languages, indicating broad coverage of product objects.

buildability.note: Public Close REST API docs exist; authentication is API-key-based HTTP Basic auth; API keys are created in-app (subject to org permissions).
